issues.description: DSL is incomplete. Card has two distinct effects: (1) a passive protection effect ('This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by ＜Strike＞ attribute Characters') and (2) an activated ability. Only the activated ability is present in DSL. The passive effect requires a Counter trigger to prevent KO from Strike Characters.
Trigger should be 'Activated' with condition 'OncePerTurn' or equivalent. Current DSL lacks the 'OncePerTurn' constraint in conditions.
